summary: Migration validation agent deployed to Azure; initial testing successful with telemetry in Application Insights. Team will integrate feedback collection (Azure Table Storage under evaluation). Incomplete migration reports observed for large batches; root cause under investigation. Client demo expected next Friday; timeline may be impacted if reporting issue persists. Team awaits final migration dataset from infrastructure team by end of week. Next meeting Monday.

actionItems.description: Evaluate options for storing user feedback for the agent workflow (consider Azure Table Storage).
Investigate incomplete migration report generation for large batches by analyzing logs and identifying root cause.
Coordinate with the infrastructure team to obtain the final migration dataset.

risks.description: Reporting issue (incomplete migration reports for large batches) may affect the client demo timeline.
risks.mitigation: Prioritize investigation and fix before demo; Prithbiraj analyzing logs to identify root cause.

risks.description: Delayed delivery of the final migration dataset may slow validation testing.
risks.mitigation: Soham to follow up with infrastructure team and escalate if not received by end of week.

blockers.description: Final migration dataset not yet received.
blockers.impact: Blocks full validation testing and demo readiness.
blockers.unblockAction: Soham to coordinate and follow up for delivery by end of week.

blockers.description: Incomplete migration reports for large batches.
blockers.impact: Blocks confidence in reporting for the demo.
blockers.unblockAction: Root cause analysis and fix by Prithbiraj.

dependencies.description: Delivery of the final migration dataset.
Selection of feedback storage mechanism for agent workflow.
